overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a gold futuristic convertible through Night City during golden hour. The vehicle navigates covered urban streets, intersections, tunnels, and elevated highways surrounded by towering megabuildings, neon advertisements, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban thoroughfare with neon signage

events.description: entering fully covered section with red walls and overhead concrete structure
accelerating through the covered street section

agents.ego_description: driving a gold convertible through covered city streets, navigating between other vehicles while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in parallel lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass structure covering the roadway with geometric ceiling panels
illuminated yellow signage reading 'MASALA STUDIOS' on building facade
smooth red painted concrete walls lining the right side of the street
red and white striped concrete barriers separating the road from the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving through an urban street entering a covered highway section. The gold convertible navigates past a 'MASALA STUDIOS' neon sign and red building walls while the overhead structure creates dramatic lighting patterns on the road.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light under the covered structure
traffic light changes from red to green
turning right at the intersection and accelerating

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light under the covered structure, then accelerates through the intersection on green, making a right turn

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red then changing to green
directional signage mounted on the overpass structure indicating exits

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light beneath the covered highway structure. After the light turns green, the car turns right onto a new road, passing highway directional signs while leaving the red-walled section behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with overpasses and megabuildings

events.description: emerging from covered section into open urban canyon with tall buildings
passing under a highway overpass with directional signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating along multi-lane highway, overtaking other vehicles while navigating under overpasses toward the distant megabuilding

notable_agents.action: purple sedan overtaking on the left side, moving at high speed

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with distinctive architecture visible in the distance
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the road
elevated concrete roadway crossing above the main street with support pillars

segments.scene_description: Driving through an open urban canyon, the vehicle accelerates past palm trees and under highway overpasses. The massive Arasaka megabuilding looms ahead in the distance while a purple sedan overtakes on the left, and the lighting shifts to warm golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial district with dense advertising and tunnel sections

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel section with blue walls and artificial lighting
exiting tunnel into open downtown area with dense digital billboards
navigating through moderate traffic while passing large holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: driving through alternating tunnel sections and open downtown streets, surrounded by dense neon advertising and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: smooth blue concrete walls of the underpass tunnel with horizontal lines
large illuminated advertising screens showing various products and brand names
elevated train track structure running above the street with support beams
modern glass facade buildings with neon accents and reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a blue-walled tunnel with artificial lighting before emerging into a dense commercial district filled with digital billboards and glass buildings. The Arasaka megabuilding grows larger ahead as the car navigates through moderate traffic under monorail tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp approaching megabuilding complex

events.description: turning onto elevated highway ramp with concrete guardrails
accelerating up the curved ramp toward the megabuilding entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating up an elevated highway ramp, approaching the massive Arasaka megabuilding complex with increasing speed

entered.detail: concrete barriers with metal railings along the elevated roadway edge
massive twin-tower megabuilding with illuminated 'ARASAKA' signage at the top
illuminated yellow directional arrows on the road surface indicating curves

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns onto an elevated highway ramp with concrete guardrails, leaving the dense commercial district behind. The massive Arasaka megabuilding dominates the view ahead as the car accelerates up the curving ramp, following illuminated road markings toward the towering structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic urban landscape that transitions from enclosed, shadowed streets into a vast, sun-drenched vista dominated by a corporate megastructure. It begins by navigating a covered highway section past a Masala Studios neon sign and red walls, momentarily pausing at a red light before turning right and leaving the sheltered architecture behind. As the vehicle accelerates into an open urban canyon, the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour glow, passing palm trees and overpasses while a purple sedan overtakes on the left. The scene then dips into a blue-walled tunnel with artificial lighting before emerging into a dense commercial district filled with digital billboards and monorail tracks. Finally, the car turns onto an elevated highway ramp, curving upward past concrete guardrails as the massive Arasaka megabuilding grows to dominate the horizon.
